title: teline osyrioides
intro: Teline osyrioides, also known as Teline osyrioides or ashy rock-rose, is a flowering plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Teline osyrioides include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
